Dora and the Search for Sol Dorado

  • Dora and the Search for Sol Dorado Trailer
    Dora discovers an enchanted gold bracelet that leads her, Boots, and Diego on a quest to Sol Dorado to make a magical wish! Friends and enemies follow Dora on the path in the all new “Dora and the Search for Sol Dorado” movie!

SPLAT-TASTIC CLIPS

All Videos
  • The Loud House: "The Sister Song"
    POP QUIZ! Can you name all of the Loud Sisters? It’s okay…we have trouble too. Don't worry! This music video is the perfect study guide! Sit back and sing-a-long and you’ll be a Loud House legend in no time!
    • 1m 58s
  • Best Races and Rescues Compilation w/ Deer Squad, PAW Patrol & Blaze!
    Watch your Nick Jr. friends such as Deer Squad, PAW Patrol, and Blaze use their super speed to save the day in these BRAND NEW episodes! This fast and furriest compilation is filled with races and rescues!
    • 15m 45s
  • Dying for Pie – Puppet Edition!
    It's Employee Brotherhood Day at the Krusty Krab! Is there more to the pie that Squidward gifts to SpongeBob? (It's a bomb.) The Pineapple Playhouse presents "Dying For Pie" - a SpongeBob episode IRL with puppets!
    • 5m 59s
  • Blaze Family Photos
    Blaze’s little sister Sparkle shows off her family photo album, sharing her favorite family memories of her mom, dad, and big brother Blaze.
    • 2m
  • Dino Rescue! The Pups Save a Pterodactyl Egg
    When a Pterodactyl mom and her egg get stuck on a ledge during a rockslide, the Pups have their work cut-out for them. Can they save this Dino family?
    • 4m 59s
  • Science Sing Along with Blaze
    Rev up the volume! Sing along with Blaze and his friends to the jams in this fun-filled Blaze music video!
    • 5m 22s
  • Peppa Pig: Peppa's Fairytale
    It's time for bed! But first, a never-ending bedtime story told by every person in the house!
    • 2m 43s
  • Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: "World's Greatest Pizza"
    There is no point in eating mediocre pizza when you can have the worlds greatest pizza!
    • 1m 22s
  • TMNT: How to Enjoy Pizza Ninja Style
    The Turtles have a few tips on how to devour their favorite cheesy treat!
    • 45s
  • Legend of Korra: "The Evolution of Korra"
    Relive all of the people and moments that made Korra's journey legendary.
    • 3m 18s
  • Legend of Korra: Old Wounds: "Metalbending"
    Korra has yet to master one element but she is sure ready to learn!
    • 1m 9s
  • NickGamer: "Bikini Bottom Brawlers"
    NickGamer is gonna get you ready to brawl in the all new SpongeBob game "Bikini Bottom Brawlers"!
    • 1m 42s

CLIPS FROM BIKINI BOTTOM

All Videos
  • Every Krusty Krab Employee Ever
    The Krusty Krab has seen some a lot of employees come and go! From Pearl to Patrick, Sandy to Squidward, and just about everyone else in Bikini Bottom, here's every Krusty Krab employee ever! One thing is for sure - SpongeBob will always there to help!
    • 18m 55s
  • SpongeBob Loving the Krusty Krab for 7 Minutes!
    From the Krabby Patties he crafts so tenderly to spending time with Mr. Krabs and Squidward– SpongeBob has a lot to love about the Krusty Krab. In honor of his obsession, check out 7 straight minutes of SpongeBob being in love with the Krusty Krab!
    • 7m 3s
  • Dying for Pie – Puppet Edition!
    It's Employee Brotherhood Day at the Krusty Krab! Is there more to the pie that Squidward gifts to SpongeBob? (It's a bomb.) The Pineapple Playhouse presents "Dying For Pie" - a SpongeBob episode IRL with puppets!
    • 5m 59s

    • 1m 43s

    SpongeBob teaches Plankton how to have fun with a song.
    • 1m 35s
  • SpongeBob SquarePants: "Campfire Song"

    • 51s
  • SpongeBob SquarePants: "The Paint Bubble"

    • 1m 51s
  • SpongeBob SquarePants: "Stuff Gary Says"
    Our favorite snail doesn't have much too say, but we still love him nonetheless!
    • 31s
  • SpongeBob Squarepants: "SpongeBob's 5 Biggest Driving Fails"
    When will SpongeBob finally get it right on the road?!
    • 1m 40s
  • SpongeBob SquarePants: Graveyard Shift: "Hash Slinging Slasher"
    SpongeBob is working a late night shift, but is he prepared for the Hash Slinging Slasher?!
    • 3m 19s
  • SpongeBob SquarePants: "Greatest Makeover Moments"
    Having the same look can get boring, that's why SpongeBob switches it up sometimes!
    • 1m 30s
  • Spongebob Squarepants: The Freakiest Freak Outs of All Time!
    Relive the freakiest milk-shooting, robot jaw dropping, ghost twirling, snake spiraling freak outs of all time!
    • 54s
  • Spongebob Squarepants: Spongebob's Greatest Krabby Patty Moments of All Time!
    Ain't nothin' krabby 'bout these Patties!
    • 29s
  • SpongeBob SquarePants: "Stuff Patrick Says"
    What will Patrick say next? He'll be the first to tell you, he has no idea.
    • 25s

All Videos
  • Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: "Hotel Tour"
    The Turtles are heading to the best hotel in town!
    • 1m 11s
  • Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: "Get to Know the Turtles"
    The NEWEST batch of TMNT bad guys are here! Meet Baron Draxum (Chief Alchemist of the Hidden City), Meat Sweats (former celebrity chef), Warren Stone (mutant earthworm), Albearto (animatronic bear), and the Foot Clan (have you see the foot on their faces?!). The Turtles will need every move they have to take these guys down!! See them AND MORE villains in the brand new series, Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles!
    • 3m 35s
  • Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: "The Beatdown"
    Bebop and Rocksteady are back, and it seems like they are tougher than ever!

YOU’VE REACHED THE SPLAT!

Welcome to nick.com, your one-stop-shop for all things Nickelodeon. Here you’ll find the latest and greatest games, clips, and full episodes of your favorite Nickelodeon shows. Looking for SpongeBob’s greatest moments of all-time? We’ve got you. Want to test your PAW Patrol trivia skills? We’ve got you there, too! Whether it’s SLIME, SPLATS, SPONGES, EXPLORADORAS, or somewhere in between—nick.com is the place for you!
